history.title: Our History
history.content: The Charitable Foundation 'Mercy and Health' was founded with a clear goal: to help those who need it most. Since the beginning of the full-scale invasion, we have focused our efforts on supporting the Armed Forces of Ukraine and medical institutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To provide necessary assistance to the military and civilians, to preserve life and health, and to bring our common Victory closer through transparency, speed, and efficiency.

media.title: Media About Us
media.content: We regularly share our achievements and work in the media. Here you can find articles and videos about our activities.

items.title: Ambulances for the Front
items.short_description: Purchase and equipment of ambulances for the evacuation of the wounded.
items.full_description: Our flagship project aimed at providing combat medics with specialized transport. Every ambulance means dozens of lives saved every month.

items.title: Tactical Med Standards
items.short_description: Providing units with certified tourniquets and NATO-standard medical kits.

items.title: Mobile Hospitals
items.short_description: Creation and deployment of autonomous medical stabilization points near the front line.

items.title: Rehabilitation Center
items.short_description: Physical and psychological recovery program for military and civilians.

items.title: Humanitarian Food Aid
items.short_description: Delivery of food and hygiene products to de-occupied and frontline settlements.

items.title: Generation of the Future
items.short_description: Support for children who have lost parents or were affected by hostilities.

items.title: New batch of ambulances sent to Bakhmut direction
